title: cyclosorus brooksii
intro: Cyclosorus brooksii, also known as the Brooks' fern or Chinese lace fern, is a species of fern native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus brooksii include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various infections. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve boiling or decocting the fronds to create a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
